improvement: Cloudflare's signed GitHub OIDC evidence runner now evaluates the verified token against the Frontier Research replay ledger and requires both exact invocation authorization and a fresh issuer/JWT-ID pair.
acceptance_contract: signature and exact invocation claims must be accepted first
issuer and raw JWT ID must be present
only a SHA-256 replay key is retained; raw JWT ID is not persisted
a live matching replay key rejects the evidence result
identity rejection cannot be bypassed by replay evaluation

verification.runtime_result: blocked because the execution environment could not resolve github.com

privacy_boundary: No OIDC token, token-request credential, raw JWT ID, private chat, health material, diagnosis, or treatment claim is persisted.
trust_limit: This integration can reject replay only against the prior ledger supplied to the runner. The current workflow does not yet provide authenticated cross-run ledger retention, so cross-run replay rejection is not claimed. It does not prove Cloudflare deployment success or scientific truth.

deployment.reason: Cloudflare protected credentials remain unavailable and C-001 is blocked_external_configuration.
